prompt: Create a vertical smartphone-wallpaper style fantasy background illustration set inside an opulent palace room at golden hour. The scene looks out through a tall arched window with ornate black-gold lattice screens toward a softly blurred domed palace and minarets in the distance. On the left, one large deep crimson patterned curtain is pulled aside, with one hanging tassel near the top center. In the foreground, place one dark carved wooden desk covered with luxurious props: one white sealed envelope with a red wax seal, one stack of scattered letters and papers, one black ink bottle, one black feather quill standing upright, one rolled parchment scroll, one ornate gold-and-black masquerade mask, one half-filled glass of red wine, one tall filigree metal lantern containing a lit candle, and two embroidered fabrics draped over the desk, one red and one black-gold. Use warm amber sunlight, dramatic shadows, dust motes, and a romantic mysterious atmosphere, with rich burgundy, bronze, black, and gold tones. Add elegant Japanese message text on the left over the curtain area reading 仮面の奥に、\n真実を隠して。, set in a refined serif style in pale gold, with a thin horizontal gold line and small sparkle beneath it. Make the composition cinematic, quiet, and slightly melancholic, as if hinting at palace intrigue and hidden truth behind a mask.
